other_observers: Paul Neldner, Dave and Marta Moore.; Dave and Marta Moore called us from the lakes to tell us the birds were there. They wanted confirmation of number and species.
specific_location: La Veta town lakes approximately .5 miles south of La Veta
description: Very large white birds. 9 were observed sleeping on the ice until they finally lifted their heads and we were able to clearly see the bills with yellow by the eye.Behaviors: Sleeping on the iceCall: None heardPlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Polly Wren Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner
